title: Agent Reinforcement Learning via Pivotal-Aware Self-Feedback Retry
summary: Agent Reinforcement Learning via Pivotal-Aware Self-Feedback Retry
whyItMatters: Large language model (LLM) agents have shown strong decision-making capabilities in long-horizon interactive tasks, yet they still struggle to effectively leverage failed trajectories: full retries incur high interaction costs, while experience retrieval tends to dilute critical experience signals. To address this, we propose PivoARL, a self-feedback retry…
